description_long: This is a medium-sized, fixed-wing airplane with a straight, high-mounted wing configuration and a conventional fuselage. The aircraft features a prominent tail section with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail design. The landing gear appears to be a tricycle type, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear under the forward fuselage. The exterior is primarily painted in a light gray or white color, with some darker markings and insignia visible on the tail and wings. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed, with multiple windows providing visibility for the crew. The airplane is situated on a paved surface, surrounded by scattered objects and debris, suggesting an urban or airfield environment.
description: A medium-sized, high-wing airplane with a conventional tail, tricycle landing gear, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. The exterior is mostly light gray or white with visible markings and details.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from a front-left angle, showing the high-mounted wings, nose, and part of the tail section, with the cockpit windows visible.
description_view_1: A direct front view highlights the airplane's nose, forward cockpit, and the full wingspan extending horizontally, with the landing gear faintly visible.
description_view_2: The airplane is viewed from a rear-right angle, displaying the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the right wing, with the fuselage and cockpit receding.
description_view_3: A direct rear view shows the tail assembly, including the vertical and horizontal stabilizers, and the trailing edges of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turboprop engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
